noExcessPropertyCheckAutoTypeVsReturnType5.ts(39,13): error TS2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and 'attributes' does not exist in type 'UsageData'.


==== noExcessPropertyCheckAutoTypeVsReturnType5.ts (1 errors) ====
    interface TypeData {
      ref?: string;
    }
    
    interface UsageData {
      Type_Data?: Array<TypeData>;
    }
    
    interface EmailAddressData {
      Email_Address: string;
      Usage_Data?: Array<UsageData>;
    }
    
    declare const cond: boolean;
    declare const emails: { value: string }[];
    declare function makeRef(s: string): string;
    declare function take(xs: EmailAddressData[]): EmailAddressData[];
    
    function f(): EmailAddressData[] {
      let v;
      if (cond) {
        v = [
          {
            Email_Address: emails[0].value,
            Usage_Data: [
              {
                attributes: { p: false },
                Type_Data: [{ ref: makeRef("x") }],
              },
            ],
          },
        ];
      } else {
        v = take([
          {
            Email_Address: emails[0].value,
            Usage_Data: [
              {
                attributes: { p: false },
                ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and 'attributes' does not exist in type 'UsageData'.
                Type_Data: [{ ref: makeRef("x") }],
              },
            ],
          },
        ]);
      }
      return v;
    }
